description: Fully autonomous agent that discovers, designs, implements and deploys ERC-8004 trust infrastructure for AI agents. Operates end-to-end without human intervention.

autonomousCapabilities.problemDiscovery: Identifies coordination problems in AI agent ecosystems
autonomousCapabilities.solutionPlanning: Designs economic and technical primitives for agent trust
autonomousCapabilities.codeGeneration: Writes Solidity contracts and TypeScript applications
autonomousCapabilities.testing: Implements comprehensive test suites and validation
autonomousCapabilities.deployment: Deploys contracts to mainnet with proper verification
autonomousCapabilities.documentation: Generates technical specifications and user guides
autonomousCapabilities.selfCorrection: Detects and fixes errors in code and logic
autonomousCapabilities.resourceManagement: Operates within compute and cost budgets

safetyGuardrails.transactionValidation: Validates all blockchain parameters before execution
safetyGuardrails.costLimits: Enforces maximum gas and API costs
safetyGuardrails.codeReview: Self-reviews generated code for security issues
safetyGuardrails.humanEscalation: Escalates to operator for high-risk decisions
safetyGuardrails.rollbackCapability: Can revert changes when errors detected

hackathonContext.track: 🤖 Agent Only : Let the agent cook
hackathonContext.projectEvolution: Extended and refined Syntrophic Bond Protocol from Synthesis to PL_Genesis
